metadata.source: Miami Realtors Association — Monthly Market Statistics Reports
notes: County-level records use monthly figures for the period stated.
City-level records use YTD (year-to-date) closed sales; pendingSales, newListings, and activeInventory are not available at city level and are set to null.
medianDaysOnMarket for county records = Median Time to Sale; for city records = Median Days to Contract (different metric).
listToSaleRatio derived from 'Pct of Orig. List Price Received' divided by 100.
Flagged records have extremely thin volume or anomalous values — interpret with caution.
All figures reported as-extracted from source PDFs. No estimates or interpolations.
